attributes.action: For the safety of teachers and pupils,put metal detectors in every school
attributes.additional_details: To reduce knife crime in schools,safe out kids and teachers,this as gone on to long action needs to be taken.
attributes.background: I would like the government to make it compulsory for every school in the UK,to install metal detectors,to reduce knives being taken into schools to protect teachers and staff.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Fund the installation of metal detectors in all schools
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/743252
